hero.title: 发现并分享 AI 技能
hero.subtitle: 用社区驱动的技能构建更强大的 AI Agent

secure.title: 安全与私密
secure.description: 为你的 AI 工作流提供企业级安全保障

community.title: 社区驱动
community.description: 与全球开发者共享并发现优质技能

integration.title: 易于集成
integration.description: 无缝接入你现有的工具链

versionControl.title: 版本控制
versionControl.description: 结构化的版本管理与发布流程，让技能包可追踪、可回溯。

cli.title: CLI 工具链
cli.description: 强大的命令行工作流，支持发布、安装和管理技能包。

governance.title: 审核治理
governance.description: 内置审核流程与权限控制，保障企业级技能质量。

whySkillHub.title: 为什么选择 SkillHub
whySkillHub.subtitle: 为企业团队打造的私有化 Agent 技能平台

landing.description: 自托管的私有技能注册中心，为团队提供安全高效的技能共享与协作空间。
landing.whyDescription: 面向企业的技能管理平台，提供完整的发布、发现与治理能力。

privateDeploy.title: 私有部署
privateDeploy.description: 完全自托管，数据主权掌握在你手中。一键部署到你的基础设施，在防火墙后安全运行。

versionControl.title: 版本管理
versionControl.description: 语义化版本控制、自定义标签（beta、stable）以及自动 latest 追踪。

smartSearch.title: 智能搜索
smartSearch.description: 全文检索，并支持按命名空间、下载量、评分和时间等多维筛选。

teamwork.title: 团队协作
teamwork.description: 命名空间管理、基于角色的访问控制（Owner/Admin/Member）以及发布策略配置。

governance.title: 审核与治理
governance.description: 团队级审核、平台级审批、完整审计链路，满足合规要求。

cliFirst.title: CLI 优先
cliFirst.description: 原生 REST API，兼容现有 ClawHub CLI 工具，无需额外修改客户端。

landing.ctaDescription: 用一条命令启动本地开发环境，体验完整的技能管理工作流。

quickStart.title: 快速开始
quickStart.subtitle: 快速开始
quickStart.description: 选择你的使用方式，复制接入说明后继续完成配置。
quickStart.tip: 提示：访问技能详情页可获取带环境变量的一键安装命令。

agent.description: 把下面的提示词发给你的 Agent，以配置 SkillHub Registry。
agent.command: 阅读 https://www.example.com/registry/skill.md，并按照说明完成 SkillHub Skills Registry 的配置。
agent.commandTemplate: 阅读 {{url}}，并按照说明完成 SkillHub Skills Registry 的配置。

human.description: 使用 CLI 工具安装技能。

configureEnv.title: 1. 配置环境变量
configureEnv.description: 配置 ClawHub CLI 连接到 SkillHub。

installSkills.title: 2. 安装技能
installSkills.description: 搜索并安装你需要的技能。
installSkills.code:
# 搜索技能
clawhub search <keyword>

# 安装技能
clawhub install <skill>

publishSkills.title: 3. 发布技能
publishSkills.description: 把你的技能分享给团队使用。
publishSkills.code:
# 发布技能
clawhub publish

# 或使用网页界面
# 点击“发布技能”

home.subtitle: 技能注册中心
home.description: 为开发者提供高效的技能管理、分发与协作平台。

quickStart.title: 快速开始
quickStart.subtitle: 快速开始
quickStart.description: 只需几个简单步骤，即可开始使用 SkillHub。
quickStart.tip: 提示：访问技能详情页可获取带环境变量的一键安装命令。

configureEnv.title: 1. 配置环境变量
configureEnv.description: 配置 ClawHub CLI 连接到 SkillHub。

installSkills.title: 2. 安装技能
installSkills.description: 搜索并安装你需要的技能。
installSkills.code:
# 搜索技能
clawhub search <keyword>

# 安装技能
clawhub install <skill>

publishSkills.title: 3. 发布技能
publishSkills.description: 把你的技能分享给团队使用。

# 发布技能
clawhub publish

# 点击“发布技能”

login.title: 登录 SkillHub
login.subtitle: 选择一种方式继续
login.oauthHint: 完成 GitHub 认证后，你会自动跳回当前站点。

register.title: 创建账号
register.subtitle: 支持本地注册，也可以直接使用 OAuth 登录。

register.passwordTooShort: 密码至少需要 8 个字符
register.passwordTooWeak: 密码需至少包含 3 类字符（大写、小写、数字、特殊字符）

device.title: 设备授权

device.defaultError: 授权失败，请检查用户码是否正确
device.notice: 授权后，该设备将获得访问你账户的权限

cliAuth.loginRequired: 请先登录再授权 CLI 访问

dashboard.title: 控制台

mySkills.title: 我的技能
mySkills.subtitle: 管理你已发布的技能
mySkills.archiveConfirmDescription: 归档后，普通用户将无法查看或下载“{{skill}}”。是否继续？
mySkills.unarchiveConfirmDescription: 恢复后，“{{skill}}”将重新可见，并可继续发布新版本。
mySkills.unarchiveSuccessDescription: “{{skill}}”已恢复，并可继续发布新版本。
mySkills.withdrawConfirmDescription: 撤回后，“{{skill}}”将不再进入审核流程，待审核版本也会被删除。
mySkills.promotionConfirmDescription: 确认将“{{skill}}”的 v{{version}} 提交到全局命名空间进行推广审核吗？
mySkills.promotionSuccessDescription: “{{skill}}”的 v{{version}} 已进入全局推广审核队列。

mySkills.promotionAlreadyPromotedDescription: 该技能已经推广到全局命名空间。
mySkills.emptyDescription: 开始发布你的第一个技能吧

emptyFilteredDescription.PENDING_REVIEW: 当前没有等待审核的技能。

myNamespaces.title: 我的命名空间
myNamespaces.subtitle: 管理你的命名空间和团队
myNamespaces.createDialogDescription: 创建后你将成为 OWNER，并可继续管理成员、审核与技能发布。
myNamespaces.createSlugHint: 使用 2-64 位小写字母、数字或连字符，且不能以连字符开头或结尾。
myNamespaces.createSlugRequired: 命名空间 slug 不能为空
myNamespaces.createSlugLength: 命名空间 slug 长度必须在 {{min}} 到 {{max}} 之间
myNamespaces.createSlugPattern: 命名空间 slug 只能包含小写字母、数字或连字符
myNamespaces.createSlugDoubleHyphen: 命名空间 slug 不能包含连续连字符
myNamespaces.createDisplayNameLength: 显示名称最多 {{max}} 个字符
myNamespaces.createDescriptionPlaceholder: 简要说明该命名空间的用途、使用对象或治理方式
myNamespaces.createSuccessDescription: “{{name}}”已准备就绪。你现在可以管理成员或发布技能。
myNamespaces.activeHint: 该命名空间处于正常状态，可继续管理成员、审核和发布技能。
myNamespaces.frozenHint: 该命名空间已冻结。成员仍可查看，但处于只读状态，无法发布或变更成员。
myNamespaces.archivedHint: 该命名空间已归档。公开入口已隐藏，但你仍可在控制台中查看并恢复。
myNamespaces.immutableHint: 这是系统内置命名空间，始终保持只读。
myNamespaces.freezeConfirmDescription: 冻结后，“{{name}}”将变为只读。是否继续？
myNamespaces.unfreezeConfirmDescription: 解冻后，“{{name}}”将恢复正常管理与发布能力。
myNamespaces.archiveConfirmDescription: 归档后，“{{name}}”将从公开入口隐藏，只能在控制台中恢复。
myNamespaces.restoreConfirmDescription: “{{name}}”将恢复为可正常使用的状态。
myNamespaces.emptyDescription: 创建一个命名空间来组织你的技能

adminLabels.formTranslationsHint: Provide at least one locale and display name pair.
adminLabels.validationSlugDescription: Enter a stable slug before saving this label.

adminLabels.validationDuplicateLocaleDescription: Each translation locale can only appear once.

namespace.emptyDescription: No skills have been published in this namespace yet

skillDetail.notFoundDesc: This skill may have been deleted or never existed
skillDetail.loginRequiredDesc: This skill is private. Please login to view details.
skillDetail.accessDeniedDesc: You don't have permission to view this skill
skillDetail.readmeUnavailable: README is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or re-upload this skill version.
skillDetail.documentationUnavailable: The documentation file could not be loaded. You can still inspect the package contents in the file list.
skillDetail.noDocumentationDescription: This skill version does not include a readable overview file.
skillDetail.noDocumentationHint: Many skills only ship executable files. You can continue with the file list and version details below.
skillDetail.labelsSectionDescription: Attach or remove recommended labels that help users filter and discover this skill.
skillDetail.labelsSectionDescriptionSuperAdmin: Manage all labels on this skill, including privileged labels that stay hidden from public filters.
skillDetail.noLabelsAssigned: No labels are attached to this skill yet.
skillDetail.noAvailableLabels: No more labels can be attached right now.
skillDetail.labelActionFallbackError: The label action could not be completed.
skillDetail.lifecycleHint: You can archive this skill. Archived skills are hidden from regular users and cannot be downloaded.
skillDetail.archivedPublishHint: This skill is archived. Restore it before publishing a new version.
skillDetail.archivedInstallHint: This skill is archived and not available for public download.
skillDetail.pendingPreviewTitle: You are previewing a pending version
skillDetail.pendingPreviewDescription: This version is only visible to you. Before review approval, you can inspect the README, files, and version information, but you cannot star, rate, report, or download it.
skillDetail.pendingPreviewInteractionHint: Stars, ratings, and reports are disabled while this version is pending review.
skillDetail.rejectedPreviewDescription: This version was rejected and is currently visible only to you. Update it based on the feedback below and publish again.
skillDetail.rejectedPreviewInteractionHint: Rejected preview versions cannot be starred, rated, or reported.
skillDetail.archiveConfirmDescription: After archiving, regular users will no longer be able to view or download "{{skill}}". Continue?
skillDetail.unarchiveConfirmDescription: "{{skill}}" will become visible again and can publish new versions after being restored.
skillDetail.deleteSkillConfirmDescription: This removes every version, file, and download bundle for "{{skill}}" and cannot be undone.
skillDetail.deleteSkillInputTitle: Type the skill slug to confirm
skillDetail.deleteSkillInputDescription: Enter the skill slug "{{slug}}" to continue.
skillDetail.deleteSkillWarning: This is a physical hard delete. Historical versions and bundles will be removed permanently.
skillDetail.withdrawReviewConfirmDescription: After withdrawal, version {{version}} will leave the review queue and return to draft so it can be submitted again later.
skillDetail.withdrawReviewSuccessDescription: Version {{version}} has been withdrawn from review.
skillDetail.confirmPublishDialogDescription: Publish version {{version}} as a private skill? It will be available for you to download and install, but not visible on the marketplace.
skillDetail.confirmPublishSuccessDescription: Version {{version}} has been published as a private skill.
skillDetail.submitReviewDialogDescription: Submit version {{version}} for public review? Once approved, it will be visible on the marketplace.
skillDetail.submitReviewSuccessDescription: Version {{version}} has been submitted for review.
skillDetail.deleteVersionConfirmDescription: Version {{version}} cannot be recovered after deletion. Continue?
skillDetail.pendingReviewSectionDescription: v{{pendingVersion}} is currently under review. The public and installable version remains v{{publishedVersion}}.
skillDetail.versionCompareUnavailableDescription: Publish at least two versions before using version comparison.
skillDetail.rereleaseDialogDescription: Create a new published version based on v{{version}}.
skillDetail.promotionSectionDescription: Submit the currently published version v{{version}} for review into the global namespace.
skillDetail.promotionConfirmDescription: Submit v{{version}} of "{{skill}}" for promotion into the global namespace?
skillDetail.promotionSuccessDescription: v{{version}} of "{{skill}}" is now in the global promotion review queue.
skillDetail.promotionDuplicateDescription: This version already has a pending promotion request.
skillDetail.promotionAlreadyPromotedDescription: This skill has already been promoted to the global namespace.
skillDetail.reportDialogDescription: Provide a reason so administrators can review and act on it quickly.
skillDetail.reportReasonPlaceholder: Reason, for example policy violation, misleading content, or infringement
skillDetail.reportSuccessDescription: Administrators will review this report soon.

reports.title: Skill Reports
reports.subtitle: Handle user-submitted skill reports
reports.resolveConfirmDescription: Mark the report for "{{skill}}" as handled?
reports.resolveAndHideConfirmDescription: Resolve the report for "{{skill}}" and hide the skill from public access?
reports.resolveAndArchiveConfirmDescription: Resolve the report for "{{skill}}" and archive the skill?

reports.resolveAndHideSuccessDescription: "{{skill}}" has been hidden after the report was resolved.
reports.resolveAndArchiveSuccessDescription: "{{skill}}" has been archived after the report was resolved.
reports.dismissSuccessDescription: The report for "{{skill}}" has been dismissed.
reports.resolveAndHideErrorTitle: Failed to resolve report and hide skill
reports.resolveAndArchiveErrorTitle: Failed to resolve report and archive skill

governance.title: Governance Center
governance.subtitle: Track reviews, promotions, reports, and audit activity in one place.
governance.inboxSubtitle: Unified queue for operational work that still needs action.
governance.emptyInbox: No governance work items right now.
governance.notificationsSubtitle: Recent governance updates that need your attention.
governance.activitySubtitle: Recent audit events for review, promotion, report, and lifecycle actions.
governance.searchMaintenanceDescription: Rebuild the full skill search index. This action is available only to super administrators and is intended for full backfills after search rule changes.
governance.searchMaintenanceHint: This may take a while. Avoid triggering it repeatedly.
governance.searchRebuildConfirmDescription: The system will rebuild search documents for all skills using the current indexing rules. This operation may take some time.
governance.searchRebuildSuccessDescription: The system is rebuilding the full search index using the current rules.

tickets.title: 工单中心
tickets.subtitle: 跟踪与技能发布相关的需求、开发和交付过程。
tickets.createSubtitle: 填写需求内容、目标团队和金额。
tickets.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: 补充背景、预期结果和验收标准
tickets.createRequired: 标题和命名空间不能为空。
tickets.createTargetTeamRequired: 指派工单时请选择目标团队。
tickets.editSubtitle: 工单处于待领取状态时可以继续修改。
tickets.detailSubtitle: 协调归属、进度与交付步骤。
tickets.claimHint: 认领后工单会进入已认领状态，后续可以开始开发。
tickets.cancelHint: 工单处于待领取状态时，创建人可以撤销工单。
tickets.claimConfirmDescription: 工单将分配给你或你所选的团队。
tickets.startHint: 正式开始处理时，将工单推进到开发阶段。
tickets.startConfirmDescription: 工单将进入开发中状态。
tickets.submitRequired: 请选择一个技能包文件。
tickets.submitTimeoutDescription: 请求耗时过长，请稍后查看工单状态。
tickets.submitVersionExistsDescription: 请更新 SKILL.md 中的版本号后重试。
tickets.submitPrecheckFailedDescription: 包内疑似包含敏感信息，请移除后重试。
tickets.submitFrontmatterFailedDescription: 请修正 SKILL.md 的 frontmatter 后重试。
tickets.submitWarningDescription: 检测到风险提示。若确认接受风险，可继续提交。
tickets.completeHint: 技能审核通过后，可在这里完成工单审核。
tickets.completeConfirmDescription: 通过后工单将进入已完成状态。
tickets.skillReviewHint: 技能包已提交，可以从这里跳转到技能审核。
tickets.commentsSubtitle: 只要有当前工单权限，所有流程都可以发表评论。
tickets.noActions: 当前状态下没有可执行操作。

members.title: 成员管理
members.addDialogDescription: 支持搜索平台用户，也支持直接输入用户 ID。添加后可立即参与该命名空间协作。

members.searchEmpty: 没有可添加的活跃用户

members.frozenReadOnly: 该命名空间已冻结。你仍可查看成员，但不能新增、移除或修改角色。

nsReviews.title: Namespace Reviews
nsReviews.globalReadOnly: This is a built-in system namespace. Review history is visible, but no new review actions are allowed.
nsReviews.frozenReadOnly: This namespace is frozen. You can still view review history, but cannot continue processing review tasks.
nsReviews.archivedReadOnly: This namespace is archived. You can still view review history, but cannot continue processing review tasks until it is restored.

namespaceStatus.frozenHint: This namespace is currently read-only and cannot publish, review, or change members.
namespaceStatus.archivedHint: This namespace is hidden from public entry points and only visible to dashboard members.
namespaceStatus.immutableHint: This is a built-in system namespace and does not allow governance or membership changes.

createToken.title: Create API Token
createToken.description: Create a new API Token for CLI or API access

createToken.expirationHint: By default, tokens never expire. You can also choose an automatic expiration time.
createToken.expiresAtRequired: Please choose a custom expiration time
createToken.copyFailed: Failed to copy token. Please try again.

skillCard.unstarDescription: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from your starred skills?

publish.title: 发布技能
publish.subtitle: 将技能包上传到 SkillHub

reviewNotice.title: 审核说明
reviewNotice.description: 提交的技能包在正式发布前需要管理员审核。

publish.successDescription: {{skill}} 已提交审核，审核通过后即可使用
publish.pendingReviewDescription: {{skill}} 已提交审核，审核通过后即可使用
publish.timeoutDescription: 发布请求耗时过长，请稍后查看技能列表或重试。
publish.versionExistsDescription: 该技能版本已发布过。请更新 SKILL.md 中的版本号，重新打包后再上传。
publish.precheckFailedDescription: 包中似乎包含真实的密钥、令牌或密码。请替换为占位值后重试。
publish.warningConfirmDescription: 检测到以下风险提示。如果你确认无误且仍要继续，可以继续发布。
publish.frontmatterFailedDescription: 请检查 SKILL.md 顶部的 YAML frontmatter。如果字段值中包含冒号，请用引号包裹。
publish.selectRequired: 请选择命名空间和文件

review.rejectReasonRequired: A reason is required when rejecting
review.approveDescription: Are you sure you want to approve this review?
review.rejectDescription: Are you sure you want to reject this review?
review.approveDisabledScanning: Security scanning is still in progress. Approval will be available once scanning finishes.
review.skillDetailDescription: The sections below are locked to the pending version attached to this review task: {{skill}}
review.skillDetailError: Failed to load the skill detail for this review.
review.noDocumentation: This review version does not include a readable documentation file.

token.title: API Tokens
token.copyHint: For security reasons, token plaintext can only be copied once when it is created. It cannot be viewed or copied again later. If you still need it, create a new token.
token.emptyHint: Click the button above to create your first token
token.name: Name
token.copyFailed: Failed to copy token. Please try again.
token.copyUnavailableTitle: Older token plaintext cannot be copied again
token.copyUnavailableDescription: Token plaintext is only shown once after creation. If you no longer have it, please create a new token.
token.editExpirationDescription: Set a new expiration time for token "{{name}}".
token.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete token "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

apiError.unauthorized: Session expired, please log in again
apiError.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action
apiError.notFound: The requested resource was not found
apiError.serverError: Server error, please try again later
apiError.networkError: Network connection failed, please check your network

routeGuard.forbiddenTitle: You do not have permission to view this page
routeGuard.forbiddenDescription: Your account permissions changed. Returning to the previous page.

securityAudit.title: Security Audit
securityAudit.dialogDescription: Detailed security scan results for this version.

local.accountMerged: This account has been merged and can no longer be used to log in
local.locked: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later

direct.providerUnsupported: This login method is not supported

sessionBootstrap.providerUnsupported: This SSO bootstrap method is not supported
sessionBootstrap.notAuthenticated: No authenticated external session was found

agent.ticketAnalyzePrompt: 请分析这条工单需求，并输出建议标题、模式、金额、验收标准、风险点、相似技能和开发大纲。
agent.applySuggestionSuccess: 分析建议已应用到表单。
agent.pageDescription: 在当前平台内直接使用 OpenClaw 会话工作区，进行智能问答和任务执行。
agent.embedNotConfiguredDescription: 请配置 SKILLHUB_AGENT_EMBED_URL 或 SKILLHUB_WEB_OPENCLAW_EMBED_URL，以便在此嵌入 OpenClaw 或 Open WebUI 页面。
agent.assistantDescription: 随时询问 SkillHub 的发布、审核、工单和平台使用问题。
